title: Smarter template recommendations in Jira Project Pages
description:
We’re excited to announce an upgrade to your Jira Project Pages experience! Now, when you visit Project Pages, you’ll see template suggestions that are tailored to your team and your work—making it easier than ever to get started and collaborate. Personalized Template Recommendations
Instead of seeing the same generic templates as everyone else, you’ll now get template suggestions that match your team type, business domain, and job function. This means you’ll spend less time searching for the ri
